issues.description: effectText describes a protection ability but effects[] is empty. Should contain a Counter trigger that prevents K.O. in battle when condition is met.
Missing trigger for battle damage prevention. Should use 'OnAttacked' to intercept K.O. damage.
Missing condition check for [Buggy] or [Mohji] Character on board. Should use 'HasCardOnBoard' with type filter.
Missing action to prevent K.O. No action type exists for 'cannot be K.O.'d' — this requires a Counter-type effect or a special immunity marker not currently supported in standard actions.

suggestedDsl.effectText: If you have a [Buggy] or [Mohji] Character, this Character cannot be K.O.'d in battle.
